title: METHODS OF TEACHING STUDENTS TO FORM PHYSICAL CULTURE SKILLS IN STUDENTS
author: Yakubov Arslon Mahmudovich
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Developing physical culture skills in students is essential for promoting lifelong health, fitness, and well-being. This paper explores effective teaching methods, including structured instruction, individualized learning, motivation techniques, and interdisciplinary approaches. Emphasizing inclusivity, engagement, and health literacy, educators can inspire students to adopt active lifestyles. By integrating modern pedagogical strategies, physical education fosters critical thinking, teamwork, and self-discipline.

keywords: physical culture, physical education, fitness, student engagement, active learning, motivation, health literacy.
